info.name: VaxTrack — Field Owner Module
info.description:
Complete Field Owner API collection for VaxTrack. Login first (folder 0) to auto-capture the token into {{foToken}}. Set {{baseUrl}} = http://localhost:5000 in your environment.

## E2E linkage
POST Create Enquiry captures {{enquiryId}}. Set {{generationId}}, {{selectorId}}, {{agentId}}, {{companyId}} from GET /api/master-data/dropdowns. Copy {{enquiryId}} into the Operational Manager collection for POST Assign Logistics.

request.description: Returns the logged-in FO's profile (name, role, mobile). Use to display "Welcome, [Name]" in the app header.
Writes a LOGOUT audit log entry. After 200, the client must delete the stored token to complete logout (JWT is stateless).

Returns 6 KPIs (total, selected, rejected, missed, futureSelection, fixedRate) scoped to the logged-in FO + last 5 recent actionable plots (Selected, Rate Fixed, Assigned, Completed) with rich populated fields (generation, companyName, packing, volume, recovery).

item.name: GET Form Dropdowns (Agents, Generations, Selectors, Companies)

request.description: Call on form load to populate all select boxes. Returns: companies[], agents[], generations[], selectors[].
FO is authorized on this route. The backend auto-sets fieldOwnerId = req.user._id. Test script captures _id into {{enquiryId}}.
Fetches a list of all Field Selectors (id, firstName, lastName, mobileNo). Used right before assigning or re-assigning an enquiry to pick a selector.
Updates an enquiry. If a new assignedSelectorId is provided, the status automatically shifts to ASSIGNED.
Manually triggers the SLA timeout check. Finds all ASSIGNED enquiries not visited in 24h, logs the missed selector into missedAssignments, and resets them to PENDING.
Returns all enquiries where missedAssignments is not empty. Each entry includes the selector(s) who failed to visit within 24h (firstName, lastName, mobileNo), sorted by updatedAt descending.
Returns all enquiries owned by this FO, paginated.
'Missed' is a derived filter (PENDING + scheduledDate < now). The backend translates this automatically.
'Rescheduled' = PENDING + scheduledDate in the future. The backend translates this automatically.

item.name: GET Plots — Search by Farmer Name
GET Single Plot Details (with Inspection & Photos)

request.description: Fetches the full plot record plus its joined Inspection (photos + composition). Returns 403 if this plot doesn't belong to the logged-in FO.

body.raw:
{
  "companyId": "{{companyId}}",
  "purchaseRate": 920,
  "packingType": "4H",
  "estimatedBoxes": 1500,
  "remarks": "Good quality G9 Cavendish. Recovery ~85%. OM notes E2E: commercial OK for cold-chain handoff Apr 2026."
}

request.description:
PREREQUISITES:
1. Enquiry status must be 'SELECTED' (inspection must be completed first)
2. FO can only fix rate for their OWN enquiries (backend checks fieldOwnerId)

Sets companyId, purchaseRate, remarks, and status → RATE_FIXED.

**New Optional Fields (2026-03-29):**
- packingType: Enum — '4H', '5H', '6H', '8H', 'CL', '7Kg', 'Other'
- estimatedBoxes: Number — planned box count for this harvest

These planning fields are stored on the Enquiry and can be overridden by the OM during team assignment if needed.

When FO reviews a SELECTED plot, they can either Fix Rate OR Reschedule. This API sets status to 'RESCHEDULED', updates rescheduleDate, clears assignedSelectorId, and logs the reason in rescheduleHistory.
Returns all selectors assigned to this FO's enquiries with: totalKm, totalDays, visitedPlots, approvedPlots, rejectedPlots.
Filter performance stats by date range (month-wise or custom).
Returns all active users with role 'Field Selector' (firstName, lastName, mobileNo, role), sorted A-Z. Use this to populate the 'Assign Selector' dropdown when creating or editing an enquiry.

Returns full mileage detail for a single DailyLog record: startKm, closeKm, totalDistance (endKm - startKm), vehicleNumber, startTime, endTime, status, odometer photo URLs, and populated selector info (name, mobile, role).

PREREQUISITE: Get a valid {{logId}} from 'GET /api/daily-logs?userId=<selectorId>' (folder 6 below).

Global Shared Pool: any Field Owner can view any selector's mileage log — no ownership restriction.

Returns all DailyLog records across all roles, paginated. Each record includes: date, startKm, endKm, vehicleNumber, startTime, endTime, status (STARTED | COMPLETED), startMeterPhotoUrl, endMeterPhotoUrl, petrolAdvance, and a populated userId (firstName, lastName, role).

Access: Admin, Operational Manager, Field Owner.

item.name: GET Daily Logs — Filter by UserId (copy selectorId from performance API)

request.description:
Filter logs by a specific user's MongoDB _id. Copy the selectorId from 'GET /api/field-owner/selectors-performance' (folder 5) and paste it into {{selectorId}}.

Test script: automatically captures the first result's _id into {{logId}} — ready to use in 'GET Selector Mileage Detail'.

item.name: GET Daily Logs — Filter by Role: Field Selector

request.description:
Returns DailyLogs only for users with role 'Field Selector'. The backend does a $lookup on the users collection so role filtering is accurate.

Other valid role values: 'driver eicher', 'driver pickup'.

item.name: GET Daily Logs — Filter by Role: driver eicher

request.description: Returns DailyLogs only for Eicher drivers. Use this on any FE screen that shows a 'Driver Logs' tab.

item.name: GET Daily Logs — Filter by Date Range

request.description: Filter logs within a date range (matches the log's 'date' field). Useful for month-wise reports. Combinable with userId and role filters.

item.name: GET Daily Logs — Filter: Completed Only

request.description: Filter by status. Values: STARTED (day begun, endKm not submitted yet) or COMPLETED (endKm submitted, totalDistance calculable).

item.name: GET Daily Logs — Combined: Role + Date + Status

request.description: All filters can be combined freely. This example: all completed Field Selector logs for March 2026. Ideal for a monthly mileage report screen.

item.name: POST Issue Diesel Advance to Driver

formdata.description: OPTIONAL — override vehicle number. If omitted, auto-resolved from driver's linked vehicleId.
Optional — link to a logistics assignment

request.description:
Issues a fuel advance to the driver.

vehicleNumber is now OPTIONAL — it is auto-resolved from the driver's linked vehicleId.vehicleNumber. Only send vehicleNumber if the driver is using a different vehicle than their default (edge case).

If the driver has no vehicle linked AND no vehicleNumber in body → returns 400 with a helpful message.

Triggers WhatsApp receipt to the driver's registered mobile. Audit log is created automatically.

query.description: Filter by a specific logistics assignment

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of all diesel advances. Populated with driver name/mobile, OM name, and linked assignment details.

Use ?driverId= to filter per driver or ?assignmentId= to see advances for a specific trip.
